s: In 2012, Jim Henderson suited up for MIL as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.520, WHIP 1.270, SO 45, WAR 0.800.
In 2013, Jim Henderson suited up for MIL as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 2.700, WHIP 1.130, SO 75, WAR 0.200.
In 2014, Jim Henderson suited up for MIL as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 7.150, WHIP 1.590, SO 17, WAR -0.100.
Changed teams after the previous season (MIL -> NYM).
In 2016, Jim Henderson suited up for NYM as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.370, WHIP 1.400, SO 40, WAR -0.200. Notable context: Joined NYM.
